title: WG Neukölln
description: WG Neukölln eG is a cooperative based in Berlin that offers various housing options and services, including apartments and residential projects. The organization is committed to social engagement and provides a venue for events, as well as support for its members through social management. They focus on sustainable energy projects and aim to enhance the living experience for their tenants. Their intended clients include individuals and families seeking affordable housing solutions in the Neukölln area.
